## 📝 Description
- What changes were made?

## 🔍 Focus for Reviewers
- Are the structural/architectural changes clean and sustainable?
- Is the code readable and follows clean code principles?
- Did we avoid adding unnecessary dependencies?

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] Code builds locally without errors or warnings.
- [ ] Automated tests have been added or updated and are passing.
- [ ] Documentation (README, inline docs, or API specs) has been updated.
- [ ] The branch history is clean and ready for merging (Linear History enforced).
